examples: When in manhood, he goes erect on two feet and when in old age, he supports his tottering legs with a stick.
She came tottering in in her mother's high heels.
She whispered in his ear, "You silly ass," and then, tottering to her chamber, lay down on the bed.
He had replaced a tottering theocracy with a hereditary monarchy, though Buddhism remained the national faith.
The effect of the collapsed banking system and tottering insurance industry has yet to be felt.
